geminiUnderstanding.title: How Claude Code Works: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Plain Text
geminiUnderstanding.summary: A walkthrough of how an agentic coding CLI plans, edits, and verifies changes, and why plain-text tool output beats heavy schemas for agent control.

approvalMessage: I found: How Claude Code Works: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Plain Text. Tapback thumbs-up to save it to Notion.
